title: Issues — File Tree → Sidebar
description: How an issue folder's sub-folders (comments, notes, brainstorm, subtasks, agent-log, agent-memory) are named and exactly what the detail-page sidebar renders. Opens with the self-contained Leading marks legend — the NN order badge, the status-tinted #iteration milestone badge, the five agent-log kind symbols, the 7 subtask status icons with their tints, and the folder chevron / descendant count — then walks each sub-folder, and covers the never-throws prefix rule that sets issues apart from docs.

artifact.purpose: Explainer mapping each issue sub-folder's on-disk naming to its sidebar treatment. Carries the consolidated Leading marks legend (NN badge, status-tinted #iteration milestone badge, agent-log kind symbols, the 7 subtask status icons + tints, folder chevron / count) as a dedicated up-front reference, then walks comments, notes, brainstorm, subtasks, agent-log (0NN meta vs MNN milestone contrast), agent-memory, the nesting cap, and the loose (never-throws) prefix parse. The trailing type glyphs live in the Suffix Icons artifact.
